ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully examining a passport, simulating the process of passport control. The robot will extend its right arm forward to receive the passport, then carefully examine it before returning its arm to a resting position.  The left arm will remain mostly at the side, but will assist in providing balance. Frame 1: Both arms are at rest. Frame 2: The right arm extends forward, palm open and slightly upward to receive the passport. Frame 3: The right arm holds the passport close to the robot's body, simulating inspection. Frame 4: The right arm begins returning to its resting position. Frame 5: Both arms return to their resting positions.

frames.beat: both arms rest at the sides, ready
right arm extends forward, palm up to receive
holding passport for inspection, close to body
right arm begins to retract, passport examined
both arms return to resting position
